title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 383.083 - Confidentiality of information and reports
text:
383.083.  Confidentiality of information and reports. — None of the information reported, compiled or summarized pursuant to sections 383.075  to 383.083 shall be discoverable or admissible in any proceeding.
(L. 1985 H.B. 657 & 337 § 5)
